segments.text: That grab connected off the pullback, but...
segments.original_text: 一度引いたことで通った掴みだったんですが

segments.text: Here's a confirmed meteor to bair!
segments.original_text: ここはメテオからの空中後ろ確定
これは展開追い切れず

full_text: That grab connected off the pullback, but... Here's a confirmed meteor to bair! Couldn't track that situation
